calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074/MECH-334/MECH-333 crystallization-necessity TRUE-NEGATIVE-CONTROL retest (+MECH-341/313 floor contrast): strip the always-on diversity floor (noise_floor/E3-diversity/dACC-suppression off; structured curiosity decoupled from crystallize) so crystallization is the SOLE phase-3 diversity route in ARM_1; phase-dependent entropy bonus (0.02 generator in phases 0-2, swept {0,0.005,0.02} in phase 3) maps the collapse threshold; ARM_4 floor-on (MECH-341/313). 5 conditions x 3 seeds, IGW-023 Phase-3 pressure. Supersedes 610e (confounded control).
items.note: Routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610e_2026-06-05 (confounded negative control). 610e was the FIRST harness-fixed crystallization run (policy genuinely trained, expansion stepped 1249 params, ewc_penalty in loss) but d2_control_shows_collapse=FALSE because MECH-313 noise floor + MECH-341 E3 score-diversity + the always-on policy entropy bonus held diversity up in BOTH arms -> INV-074's collapse-without-crystallization premise was never instantiated. 610f makes ARM_0 a TRUE NEGATIVE: (a) strip noise_floor + E3 score-diversity + dACC anti-recency suppression, and decouple structured curiosity from crystallize, in the stripped arms so the ONLY ARM_0-vs-ARM_1 difference is crystallize_at_phase3; (b) make the policy entropy bonus PHASE-DEPENDENT -- ENTROPY_BONUS_TRAIN=0.02 in phases 0-2 (every arm; generates the diversity so D3 sanity is non-vacuous + crystallization has something real to preserve) and SWEPT in phase 3 {ARM_0=0.0, ARM_2=0.005, ARM_3=0.02} to map where the control starts to collapse; (c) ARM_4 = stripped control + noise_floor + E3 score-diversity ON to test MECH-341/313's robust-floor reading honestly (the fork-c observation 610e could only note, now scored via D4). Carries forward the MANDATORY startup assertion (_assert_fixes_wired ERRORs the run if policy-train / expansion-step / ewc-penalty wiring is missing). Acceptance: D1 ARM_1.end_p3 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10; D2 ARM_0.end_p2 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10 (true-negative collapses); D3 both > 0.4 at phase2; PASS = D1 AND D2 AND D3. D4 ARM_4.end_p3 - ARM_0.end_p3 >= +0.10 scores MECH-341/313 (per-claim). evidence_direction_per_claim emitted (5 claims). Pre-registered fork: D2 FAIL with D3 holding = V3 policy not WTA-prone -> non_contributory-for-INV-074 (universal invariant NOT weakened), escalate Phase-3 pressure; D2 PASS + D1 FAIL = weakens MECH-334 -> /diagnose-errors. ~35h cloud run (610e actual ~142 min/run x 15 runs). 10th crystallization-arm result; FIRST with both harness fixed AND a genuine true-negative control.

items.title: Coherence-ablation: is C(tau) non-reducible to E(tau)? Settles thought_intake_2026-04-23_binding.md + _path_integral_constraints_search.md (shared discriminator). Paired A/B selectors over identical hippocampal-rollout candidate pools: A = pure error-minimiser argmin E (the existing softmax(-E/T) rule); B = coherence-weighted argmin(E + lam*(-log C)) with GAP-RELATIVE authority (coherence-term range == gain*range(E); == argmax exp(-beta E)*C in the soft-beta regime). C(tau) computed in-harness from per-candidate Trajectory.world_states (z_world) / .states (z_self) / .action_objects streams = cross-system temporal/phase consistency, independent of E/outcome. No ree_core change. 3 conditions (real_C_clean primary / rand_C_control specificity / real_C_perturb rebinding) x 3 seeds. Diagnostic, claim_ids=[].
items.note: Chip task_34494eac. Single experiment settles BOTH 2026-04-23 intakes (binding-coherence and trajectory-coherence are the same C(tau)). QUESTION (verbatim): does a multiplicative coherence term in P(tau)~exp(-beta E)*C change WHICH trajectory/binding is selected INDEPENDENTLY of prediction-error magnitude? SCALE FIX (mandatory, pre-flight verified): E spreads ~O(50) across candidates while -log C spreads ~O(0.004) -- a fixed-magnitude C never changes argmin ('drowning', the modulatory-bias-selection-authority failure mode CLAUDE.md 2026-06-03). beta is a FREE temperature; arm B uses gap-relative authority (gain=0.5) so C is competitive in near-ties but subdominant when the E-gap exceeds gain*range(E). Pre-flight probe confirmed the fix produces flips (44/80 measured steps). ACCEPTANCE (real_C_clean, per seed): D1 frac_state_div (paired-agent world_state divergence) >= 0.05; D3 |Spearman corr(E,C)| < 0.90 (C carries info orthogonal to E); SPEC real_C frac_state_div >= rand_C_control frac_state_div + 0.05 (coherence-specific, not generic tie-break). PASS = D1 AND D3 AND SPEC on >=2/3 seeds. INTERPRETATION GRID (diagnostic, weights no claim; applied at review): (1) PASS [C_nonreducible_coherence_specific_register] -> convert candidate Q entities/selection.coherence_nonreducibility to a registerable claim + /implement-substrate wiring C into E3.select under gap-relative authority; (2) D1+D3 but NOT SPEC [specificity_unproven] -> do NOT register, /failure-autopsy or sharper coherence read (real_C_perturb rebinding signature vs random); (3) NOT D1 [F1] -> no behavioural effect even with authority -> CLOSE both intakes; (4) NOT D3 [F2] -> C reduces to E -> CLOSE both intakes. Honours memory feedback_biology_before_formal_definitions: the path-integral/least-action import is the philosophy-right/mechanism-wrong risk class -- register only on coherence-specific BEHAVIOURAL divergence (random-C control + corr<1), never on formal similarity. bears_on (NOT tagged, claim_ids=[]): INV-002/ARC-018/MECH-061/MECH-269/MECH-270. Harness-level ablation, ree_core untouched (generate_trajectories + score_trajectory + Trajectory streams read; selection re-implemented in harness only to ablate C). P0=40 warmup (agent.eval, online E2 via record_transition + update_z_goal -> no new trained head, no joint-training collapse) then P1=25 measurement; arms split only at P1, identical lockstep state through P0. Smoke: --dry-run PASS (3 conditions end-to-end, emit_outcome fires, dry-scale FAIL/F1 expected -- behavioural gate needs full scale).
